arts.ttl: Arsenal outcast Tierney set for Celtic reunion as transfer agreed
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Kieran Tierney has agreed a move to Celtic in the summer transfer window, manager Brendan Rodgers has confirmed. The 27-year-old left the Scottish outfit to join the Gunners in 2019 for a reported £25 million fee, but has been beset by injuries in recent years. Tierney has fallen out of favour with Arsenal […] The post Arsenal outcast Tierney set for Celtic reunion as transfer agreed first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Every word from Mikel Arteta's pre-Girona presser
arts.sum: They’re a really good side, if you look at the games they’ve played in the Champions League against top opposition, they’ve made life very difficult for them. Every time I talk about this topic, regardless of whether it’s about a player, a coach or a referee it doesn’t matter - we really have to work harder to eradicate this part of the game that brings nothing but bad stuff, leaves a bad taste and makes people’s lives more difficult.

arts.ttl: Arsenal starlet Lewis-Skelly avoids three-game ban following red card appeal
arts.sum: Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly has had his red card against Wolves following a successful appeal. The 18-year-old was sent off by referee Michael Oliver at Molineux for a late challenge on Matt Doherty, which was upheld by a VAR review. The controversial decision was heavily criticised by Arsenal fans and manager Mikel Arteta, who was […] The post Arsenal starlet Lewis-Skelly avoids three-game ban following red card appeal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to Arsenal's successful Myles Lewis-Skelly red card appeal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said he is very pleased to have Myles Lewis-Skelly back available with the group before Arsenal play on Wednesday night. The big news which has dominated the latest footballing discourse has, of course, been regarding the sending off of Myles Lewis-Skelly.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Celtic confirm Kieran Tierney transfer with Arsenal star set for emotional return
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney has found himself out of favour at Arsenal, with the left-back's contract set to expire at the end of the season, and now Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has confirmed the player will join them this summer at the latest

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Kieran Tierney agrees return to Celtic as Brendan Rodgers make January request
arts.sum: Celtic hope Arsenal will let Tierney make his return this month rather than in the summer

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly must be 'MORE aggressive', claims Nigel Winterburn - as legendary Arsenal full back outlines how far he can go
arts.sum: He is not surprised to see the Islington-born talent become a trusted member of Mikel Arteta 's squad but thinks he has a lot to learn about the left-back position which he manned in his own career.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney to Celtic return confirmed by Brendan Rodgers as he gives fans announcement they've been waiting for
arts.sum: Tierney's return has now been confirmed from the horse's mouth as the Arsenal star moves closer to a move 'home'

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly red card overturned: Can Michael Oliver ever referee another Arsenal game?
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts believes that Michael Oliver should not referee another Arsenal game this season following his controversial Myles Lewis-Skelly sending-off.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly red card at Wolves overturned after successful Arsenal appeal
arts.sum: Teenage midfielder Lewis-Skelly was sent off for serious foul play after bringing down Matt Doherty.
